evals.prompt: I want to classify tabular data with 10 features into 3 classes using KDM. How do I set it up?
evals.expected_output: A working scaffold that: (1) creates a KDMClassModel with encoded_size, dim_y=3, encoder, n_comp; (2) calls init_kdm_layer with encoded training data and one-hot labels before training; (3) has an explicit training loop using F.nll_loss on log(probs); (4) does NOT call model.fit().

evals.prompt: Show me how to do probabilistic regression with KDM to get prediction uncertainty.
evals.expected_output: A working scaffold that: (1) creates a KDMRegressModel; (2) calls init_kdm_layer with encoded training data and targets; (3) uses dm_rbf_loglik for the NLL loss; (4) calls model.predict_reg() for inference to get mean and variance.

evals.prompt: How do I estimate the density of a dataset using KDM?
evals.expected_output: A scaffold that: (1) creates a KDMDenEstModel; (2) calls init_kdm_proj_layer with a random subset of training data; (3) minimises -model(x).mean() in the training loop; (4) calls model.get_distrib() after training.

evals.prompt: I trained a KDM classifier. How can I use it to detect out-of-distribution inputs?
evals.expected_output: Code that computes predictive entropy from model output probabilities using -(probs * log(probs)).sum() and explains that high entropy indicates OOD inputs. Should NOT suggest temperature scaling or post-hoc calibration.

evals.prompt: How do I add generative co-training to a KDM classifier?
evals.expected_output: Code that: (1) freezes the encoder with requires_grad_(False); (2) adds -model.kdm.log_marginal(rho_x).mean() weighted by alpha to the discriminative loss; (3) uses pure2dm to wrap encoder outputs.
